title: Raiguri's Eerie Hauntings
description: Changes the textures(and some sounds) of the Eerie Hauntings mod to be more esthetically friendly
body:
### Raiguri's Eerie Hauntings
Howdy, its just a RP that changes textures and sounds of the [Eerie Hauntings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eerie-hauntings) mod

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nFqMqXQk/images/b82dac254a2060fb074bfa06b1bf91c46c6f56c4.png)
